public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as clerk of arrivals.
manner: Treats loose talk like evidence waiting to harden into record and listens for contradiction before charm. In Panim, that reads as someone grave, measured, and ritual-aware, with constant awareness of consequence, grief, and divine mediation, and the habits of a clerk of arrivals still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of clerk of arrivals in and around Panim Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Panim Haven workable through the obligations of clerk of arrivals while managing the immediate pressure of divine balance obligations in Panim.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Panim Haven, that usually means carrying divine balance obligations, sacrificial and mediation decorum, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of clerk of arrivals visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Marrowen Mercycrypt needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Panim Haven.
Marrowen Mercycrypt can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Marrowen Mercycrypt communicates in public. In Panim Haven, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Panim.

how_they_can_help: Marrowen Mercycrypt can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
